description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, compact bullpup design with a predominantly white and gray body accented by orange highlights. The frame is robust, with a prominent integrated suppressor at the muzzle and a tactical rail system along the top for mounting accessories. The grip is ergonomic, with a black textured surface for improved handling, and the trigger guard is large, allowing for gloved use. The magazine is housed behind the grip, characteristic of bullpup rifles, and the stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, providing a streamlined profile. The rifle also includes a visible sighting system mounted on the top rail and several mechanical details such as bolts and levers, suggesting modularity and advanced functionality. The overall appearance is modern and tactical, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters scenarios.
description: A modern, compact bullpup rifle with a white and gray body, orange accents, integrated suppressor, and tactical rail system. Features ergonomic grip, rear magazine, and advanced sighting system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical suppressor and narrow profile, with the sight and top rail visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ergonomic grip, orange-accented body, tactical rail, and integrated suppressor.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the suppressor's end, rear stock integration, and the compact bullpup layout.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the magazine placement, detailed mechanical components, and the full length of the suppressor.
